Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
CODEBOOK: Encounter Records RIFs │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 9 

BENE_RACE_CD 

LABEL: Beneficiary Race Code 

DESCRIPTION: Race code of the beneficiary 

SHORT NAME: BENE_RACE_CD 

LONG NAME: BENE_RACE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS Encounter Data System (EDS) 

FILE(S): IP base 
SNF base 
HH base 
OP base 
Carrier base 
DME base 

VALUES: 0 = Unknown 
1 = White 
2 = Black 
3 = Other 
4 = Asian 
5 = Hispanic 
6 = North American
